# Persona Addition Checklist

Use this checklist when adding a new persona to docs/octoacme-roles-and-personas.md.

- [ ] Persona name and short Role Summary added
- [ ] Responsibilities (3–6 bullet points) specified
- [ ] Interactions: list who this role works with and how (2–4 bullets)
- [ ] Examples of typical communications / meetings where this role participates
- [ ] Suggested owner(s) for assigning in project contexts (e.g., Engineering Manager, Lead PM)
- [ ] Add cross-references in other docs if relevant (e.g., release checklist, risk register, on-call runbook)
- [ ] Optional: link to templates or runbooks (e.g., runbook for release manager, threat model template)
- [ ] PR reference and stakeholder reviewers added for sign-off

Suggested file location: docs/templates/persona-addition-checklist.md
